steps.title: Identify the rate term
steps.content: In the model $w(t)=280-5t$, the coefficient of $t$ is $-5$. That means the volume changes by $-5$ milliliters each second.

steps.title: Interpret the decrease
steps.content: The negative sign shows the tank is losing liquid. The amount draining each second is the magnitude of the rate, $5$ milliliters. The answer is D.
